title: The pink creature tree — Sara points
prompt: Mid-shot from the LEFT side of a black Jeep already stopped in @magic-forest-sandy. @Sara already leaning out the rear right passenger window, eyes wide, arm extended pointing past the camera. @Eva already squashed in next to her at the same window, mouth a perfect 'O', both hands cupped around her mouth in awed silence. THROUGH the window perspective: a tall pine tree in the middle distance with a tall PINK-painted hollow opening in its trunk — the @pink-creature-tree, glowing soft pink from inside, a tiny doorway-shape hollow at its base. Sara (urgent whisper, pointing): "MAMA, LOOK! A magic creature lives in there!" Eva (cupping her mouth, hushed whisper): "Maybe they're... HIDING from us!" Sara (whispering back): "Don't scare them..."
